  ## What
  Multi-repo fix ensuring warm-up reply promotions are auditable, GAS handles cash sales cleanly, and 7 serialized QR cacao bags sold to Will Chen at Stanford Farm.
  
  ## Changes
  - **go_to_market**: suggest_warmup_prospect_drafts.py now records prospect reply content in DApp Remarks before flipping status; new backfill_warmup_reply_remarks.py for historical rows
  - **tokenomics**: GAS updateStripeCheckoutMetadata validates cs_(live|test)_ prefix before Stripe checkout lookup (deployed Version 10)
  - **dao_client**: 7 [SALES EVENT] submissions for Will Chen cash sale + template cash-sale hints
  - **agentic_ai_context**: cash sale pattern docs, ledger ≠ physical possession distinction
